div.p: C H A R T E R

p.seg: Bertram the prior, and the monastic community of the Church of Durham, to their well-beloved brethren, the monks of Durham at Farne serving God and Saint Cuthbert now and and for ever in the future, greeting.

Know us, prompted by charitable love and with the agreement of our chapter, to have given, granted, and by this our present charter to have made firm, to God and Saint Cuthbert, and to the monastery of Farne and to you who are serving God and Saint Cuthbert there now and for ever in the future, the entire teind of corn of our church at Old Cambus in everlasting alms and to support Christ’s poor, rendering thereupon annually to our almary one merk of silver, half at Pentecost and half at the feast of St Martin.
And so that this our donation remain authoritative and undisputed in times to come, we have strenghthened it by the application of the seal of our chapter.
